data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) commit 8081c3a4b74b is on origin/main with parent 63c9ce7d, (2) CI run 22960997684 passed (status=completed, conclusion=success), (3) no invariants defined, (4) all three features implemented correctly: --remove strips guidance marker blocks via awk, --dry-run previews without writes, --help/-h shows prompt_usage(). Tests in prompt-cli.test.ts cover all three paths. README updated with documentation. Both commits tagged: commit:f846d4e9458b (implementation), commit:8081c3a4b74b (merge).
